PHASE: Phase 4 Part 5f complete

LAST_DONE: Part 5f — Feature surface (call history /app/history + recordings /app/recordings + chat history /app/chat/[id]) + four in-call overlays (chat sidebar, file dropzone, whiteboard, recording indicator). 12 new files in 3 sequential bundles within a single Opus session (Tier 3 score 51.5, mandatory split per memory-governance §1). Bundle A backend (4): recordings router (list/getDownloadUrl/softDelete with verifyKeyOwnership + writeAuditLog), chat router (listByMeeting/send with sanitizePlainText), calls.listHistory append, router.ts registration. Bundle B pages (4): 3 RSC pages using createServerCaller + 1 "use client" download button island. Bundle C overlays (4 new + 2 modified): InCallRecordingIndicator (pulsing red badge driven by recording_enabled prop), InCallChat (right-side aside, 3s polling refetchInterval, send+invalidate), InCallFileDropzone (Dialog + native HTML5 dnd, 10MB cap, file_url=pending:// placeholder), InCallWhiteboard (Dialog + HTML5 canvas pointer-event drawing, local-only). MeetingRoom wired with header toggle buttons (MessageSquare/Paperclip/PaintBucket lucide-react icons); meeting page extended to pass recording_enabled. 2 errors caught early by per-bundle verify: FAILED_PRECONDITION→PRECONDITION_FAILED (correct tRPC v11 code), Prisma.CallLogFindManyArgs type-annotation widened select-narrowing→switched to conditional spread `...(input?.type ? { where } : {})`. Two-stage review PASS — Stage 1 spec compliance (all 7 declared surfaces present), Stage 2 code quality (no any, L6+L5 active, sanitize, generic errors, scope discipline). No new lessons.md entries needed — all patterns are extensions of existing 5b/5c/5d/5e/7 patterns. Follow-ups documented inline in component JSDoc: real-time chat (3s poll → Socket.IO sub on meeting:{id}:chat), file upload (pre-signed PUT + storage.uploadObject + replace pending:// placeholder), whiteboard multiplayer broadcast, Egress live recording state feed, Kibo UI dropzone swap-in (`npx shadcn add @kibo-ui/dropzone`).

NEXT: Phase 4 Part 8 — CI workflows (.github/workflows/ci.yml + docker-publish.yml), MANIFEST.txt full file inventory, final IMPLEMENTATION_MAP rewrite, README.md, SocratiCode initial index trigger. Est. ~6 files / ~50K — SAFE single-session Opus. Part 8 unlocks Phase 5 validation (all 9 commands + the 4 governance tools from Part 7) once CREDENTIALS.md placeholders are filled.

BLOCKERS: ⏳ Same as Part 7 — CREDENTIALS.md placeholders must be filled before Phase 5 (GitHub PAT, Docker Hub token, SMTP, Komodo URL, Xendit keys, Turnstile prod keys, LiveKit API key/secret, Coturn static-auth-secret). 8 empty placeholders flagged by pnpm tools:check-env across .env.staging and .env.prod.
